content.description: Session-level ADFS sign-ins with correlated Duo activity, including matched, direct Duo, no match, and expected-state outcomes.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS + Duo: Correlated Login Tracing</label>
    <description>Session-level ADFS sign-ins with correlated Duo activity, including matched, direct Duo, no match, and expected-state outcomes.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "ADFS + Duo: Correlated Login Tracing",
	"description": "Session-level ADFS sign-ins with correlated Duo activity, including matched, direct Duo, no match, and expected-state outcomes.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "@d,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_outcome": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "All",
						"value": "*"
					},
					{
						"label": "Success",
						"value": "Success"
					},
					{
						"label": "Token Failure",
						"value": "Token Failure"
					},
					{
						"label": "Credential Failure",
						"value": "Credential Failure"
					}
				],
				"token": "outcome_filter"
			},
			"title": "Outcome Filter",
			"type": "input.dropdown"
		},
		"input_user": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "user_input"
			},
			"title": "User Filter",
			"type": "input.text"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_outcome_pie": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_outcome_dist"
			},
			"options": {
				"labelDisplay": "valuesAndPercentage"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "SSO Outcome Distribution",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_correlated_sessions": {
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_correlated_sessions"
			},
			"eventHandlers": [
				{
					"options": {
						"earliest": "-30m",
						"latest": "now",
						"newTab": true,
						"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) \"$row.Activity ID$\" | rex \"Activity ID:\\\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | sort _time",
						"type": "search"
					},
					"type": "drilldown.linkToSearch"
				}
			],
			"options": {
				"columnFormat": {
					"Activity ID": {
						"width": 140
					},
					"Application": {
						"width": 220
					},
					"Client IP": {
						"width": 130
					},
					"Confidence": {
						"width": 95
					},
					"Correlation": {
						"width": 120
					},
					"Duo Application": {
						"width": 220
					},
					"Duo Factor": {
						"width": 150
					},
					"Duo Offset": {
						"width": 90
					},
					"Duo Result": {
						"width": 95
					},
					"Flow": {
						"width": 95
					},
					"MFA State": {
						"width": 170
					},
					"Nearby Duo": {
						"width": 120
					},
					"Network Location": {
						"width": 120
					},
					"Path": {
						"width": 220
					},
					"Protocol": {
						"width": 80
					},
					"Result": {
						"width": 110
					},
					"Time": {
						"width": 130
					},
					"User": {
						"width": 115
					},
					"Why": {
						"width": 290
					}
				},
				"count": 50,
				"drilldown": "row",
				"headerVisibility": "fixed",
				"showInternalFields": false
			},
			"title": "Correlated Login Sessions",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_timeline": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timeline"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Login Outcomes Over Time",
			"type": "splunk.line"
		},
		"viz_total": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "SSO Total",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_outcome_dist": {
			"name": "SSO Outcome Distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND (\"$user_input$\" OR \"the organization-AD\\\\$user_input$\"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages by activity_id\n| eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0)\n| eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",token_fail==1,\"Token Failure\",cred_fail==1,\"Credential Failure\",1=1,\"Other\")\n| where outcome!=\"Other\" AND (\"$outcome_filter$\"=\"*\" OR outcome=\"$outcome_filter$\")\n| stats count by outcome",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_correlated_sessions": {
			"name": "Correlated Login Sessions",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND (\"$user_input$\" OR \"the organization-AD\\\\$user_input$\"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex field=_raw \"redirect_uri=(?<ru_raw>[^&]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)</AuthProtocol>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaPerformed>(?<mfa_flag_txt>true|false)</MfaPerformed>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaMethod>(?<mfa_method_tmp>[^<]+)</MfaMethod>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<IpAddress>(?<ip_address>[^<]*)</IpAddress>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ForwardedIpAddress>(?<forwarded_ip>[^<]*)</ForwardedIpAddress>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<NetworkLocation>(?<network_location>[^<]+)</NetworkLocation>\"\n| eval mfa_flag=if(mfa_flag_txt==\"true\",1,0)\n| eval mfa_method=if(EventCode==1200,mfa_method_tmp,null())\n| eval ru1=urldecode(trim(ru_raw))\n| eval ru2=replace(ru1,\"\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}(?:\\s\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2})?\",\"\")\n| eval ru3=replace(ru2,\"[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36}\",\"\")\n| eval ru4=replace(replace(ru3,\"A\",\"://\"),\"F\",\"/\")\n| eval ru5=replace(ru4,\"^(https?)0*\\d+/\",\"\\1://\")\n| eval ru6=replace(ru5,\"/[0-9A-F]/\",\"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(ru6,\"^(https?)[A-Za-z0-9]{2}/\",\"\\1://\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(redirect_uri,\"/+\",\"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri=replace(redirect_uri,\"^https:/\",\"https://host.example.gov

/"),2)
| eval user_raw=coalesce(UserId,Target_User_Name,Caller_User_Name,Client_User_Name,xml_user)
| eval user=replace(user_raw,"^the organization-AD\\\\","")
| eval client_ip=coalesce(forwarded_ip,ip_address)
| eval client_ip=mvindex(split(client_ip,","),0)
| stats min(_time) as start_time max(_time) as end_time values(EventCode) as stages count as event_count values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw values(auth_protocol) as protos values(redirect_uri) as redirect_uri values(redirect_host) as redirect_host values(host) as servers values(proxy_server) as proxy_servers values(user) as users values(client_ip) as client_ips values(network_location) as network_locations max(mfa_flag) as mfa_flag values(mfa_method) as mfa_methods by activity_id
| eval user=mvindex(users,0)
| eval client_ip=mvindex(client_ips,0)
| eval network_location=mvindex(network_locations,0)
| eval mfa_method=mvindex(mfa_methods,0)
| eval rps_raw=mvdedup(rps_raw)
| eval rp_clean=mvfilter(rps_raw!="WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)" AND rps_raw!="https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] eval relying_party=coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean,0),mvindex(rps_raw,0))
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly
| eval relying_party=coalesce(rp_friendly,relying_party)
| eval proto_raw=lower(mvindex(mvfilter(len(protos)>0),0))
| eval protocol=case(match(proto_raw,"oauth"),"OIDC",match(proto_raw,"saml"),"SAML",match(proto_raw,"wsfed"),"WS-Fed",1=1,"Other")
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as redirect_host output friendlyName as uri_friendly_host
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names.csv url as redirect_uri output friendlyName as uri_friendly_full
| eval uri_friendly=coalesce(uri_friendly_full,uri_friendly_host)
| eval is_proxy=if(mvcount(mvfilter(proxy_servers!="N/A"))>0,1,0)
| eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1202")>=0,1,0)
| eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1203")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1200")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1201")>=0,1,0)
| eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,"Success",token_fail==1,"Token Failure",cred_fail==1,"Credential Failure",1=1,"Other")
| where outcome!="Other" AND ("$outcome_filter$"="*" OR outcome="$outcome_filter$")
| eval application=case(protocol=="OIDC",coalesce(uri_friendly,redirect_uri),1=1,relying_party)
| eval flow=case(is_proxy==1,"WAP->ADFS",1=1,"ADFS-only")
| eval proxies=mvdedup(mvfilter(proxy_servers!="N/A"))
| eval adfs_nodes=mvdedup(servers)
| eval path=if(is_proxy==1,mvjoin(mvappend(proxies,adfs_nodes)," -> "),mvjoin(adfs_nodes," -> "))
| eval mfa_state=case(mfa_method=="MFA","Duo Push (fresh MFA)",mfa_method=="SSO","Session SSO (no new MFA)",mfa_method=="N/A","No MFA (App Policy)",1=1,"Unknown")
| eval fresh_duo_expectation=case(mfa_state=="Duo Push (fresh MFA)","Fresh Expected",mfa_state=="Session SSO (no new MFA)","Fresh Not Expected",mfa_state=="No MFA (App Policy)","Fresh Not Expected",1=1,"Unknown")
| eval duo_correlation_eligibility=case(mfa_state=="No MFA (App Policy)","Not Eligible",mfa_state=="Duo Push (fresh MFA)","Eligible",mfa_state=="Session SSO (no new MFA)","Eligible",1=1,"Eligible")
| eval user_lower=lower(user)
| join type=left user_lower [search index=duo username="$user_input$"
    | spath
    | search result!="" integration!=PAM
    | eval duo_time=_time
    | eval user_lower=lower(mvindex(username,0))
    | eval duo_factor=mvindex(factor,0)
    | eval duo_result=mvindex(result,0)
    | eval duo_application=mvindex(integration,0)
    | eval duo_reason=mvindex(reason,0)
    | eval duo_ip=coalesce(mvindex(ip,0),mvindex(access_device_ip,0),mvindex(client_ip,0),mvindex(ip_address,0))
    | eval duo_type=mvindex(type,0)
    | eval duo_class=case(
        duo_application=="the organization Authentication Services" OR duo_type=="adfs","ADFS Path",
        duo_application=="Admin API - Scripting API for removing bypass ..." OR duo_application=="Admin API - TranSAAct and Asset Manager" OR duo_application=="Admin API - TranSAAct2","Exclude",
        duo_application=="a the organization Application" OR duo_application=="Admin API - Otis Ads" OR duo_application=="Admin API - Powershell" OR duo_application=="Admin API - Splunk connector" OR duo_application=="Cisco ASA SSL VPN" OR duo_application=="Entra ID" OR duo_application=="LDAP Auth Proxy" OR duo_application=="Okta 2FA Partner" OR duo_application=="the organization Outlook Web Access","Direct App",
        1=1,"Direct App")
    | table user_lower duo_time duo_factor duo_result duo_application duo_reason duo_ip duo_class]
| eval time_diff=abs(start_time-duo_time)
| where isnull(duo_time) OR time_diff<=60
| eval ip_match=if(isnotnull(client_ip) AND isnotnull(duo_ip) AND client_ip=duo_ip,1,0)
| eval score=case(isnull(duo_time),null(),duo_class=="Exclude",null(),1=1,if(ip_match=1,50,0)+if(time_diff<=5,40,if(time_diff<=10,25,if(time_diff<=20,15,if(time_diff<=30,5,0))))+if(duo_class=="ADFS Path",100,if(duo_class=="Direct App",60,0))-if(isnotnull(client_ip) AND isnotnull(duo_ip) AND client_ip!=duo_ip,20,0))
| eventstats max(eval(if(duo_class=="ADFS Path",score,null()))) as best_adfs_score by activity_id
| eventstats count(eval(duo_class=="ADFS Path" AND score=best_adfs_score AND isnotnull(best_adfs_score))) as best_adfs_ties by activity_id
| eventstats max(eval(if(duo_class=="Direct App",score,null()))) as best_direct_score by activity_id
| eventstats count(eval(duo_class=="Direct App" AND score=best_direct_score AND isnotnull(best_direct_score))) as best_direct_ties by activity_id
| eventstats count(eval(duo_class=="ADFS Path" AND isnotnull(score))) as adfs_candidate_count by activity_id
| eventstats count(eval(duo_class=="Direct App" AND isnotnull(score))) as direct_candidate_count by activity_id
| eval sel_adfs=if(duo_class=="ADFS Path" AND score=best_adfs_score AND best_adfs_ties=1,1,0)
| eval sel_direct=if(duo_class=="Direct App" AND score=best_direct_score AND best_direct_ties>=1,1,0)
| eval duo_factor_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_factor,null())
| eval duo_result_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_result,null())
| eval duo_application_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_application,null())
| eval duo_reason_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_reason,null())
| eval duo_ip_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_ip,null())
| eval duo_time_adfs=if(sel_adfs=1,duo_time,null())
| eval duo_factor_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_factor,null())
| eval duo_result_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_result,null())
| eval duo_application_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_application,null())
| eval duo_reason_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_reason,null())
| eval duo_ip_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_ip,null())
| eval duo_time_direct=if(sel_direct=1,duo_time,null())
| stats first(start_time) as start_time first(user) as user first(application) as application first(protocol) as protocol first(outcome) as outcome first(mfa_state) as mfa_state first(fresh_duo_expectation) as fresh_duo_expectation first(duo_correlation_eligibility) as duo_correlation_eligibility first(client_ip) as client_ip first(network_location) as network_location first(flow) as flow first(path) as path max(best_adfs_score) as best_adfs_score max(best_adfs_ties) as best_adfs_ties max(best_direct_score) as best_direct_score max(best_direct_ties) as best_direct_ties max(adfs_candidate_count) as adfs_candidate_count max(direct_candidate_count) as direct_candidate_count values(duo_factor_adfs) as duo_factor_adfs values(duo_result_adfs) as duo_result_adfs values(duo_application_adfs) as duo_application_adfs values(duo_reason_adfs) as duo_reason_adfs values(duo_ip_adfs) as duo_ip_adfs values(duo_time_adfs) as duo_time_adfs values(duo_factor_direct) as duo_factor_direct values(duo_result_direct) as duo_result_direct values(duo_application_direct) as duo_application_direct values(duo_reason_direct) as duo_reason_direct values(duo_ip_direct) as duo_ip_direct values(duo_time_direct) as duo_time_direct by activity_id
| eval adfs_duo_time=mvindex(duo_time_adfs,0)
| eval direct_duo_time=mvindex(duo_time_direct,0)
| eval adfs_duo_offset=if(isnotnull(adfs_duo_time),round(adfs_duo_time-start_time,1)."s",null())
| eval direct_duo_offset=if(isnotnull(direct_duo_time),round(direct_duo_time-start_time,1)."s",null())
| eval adfs_ip_match=if(isnotnull(client_ip) AND isnotnull(mvindex(duo_ip_adfs,0)) AND client_ip=mvindex(duo_ip_adfs,0),1,0)
| eval adfs_time_diff=if(isnotnull(adfs_duo_time),abs(start_time-adfs_duo_time),null())
| eval adfs_duo_factor=mvindex(duo_factor_adfs,0)
| eval remembered_device_match=if(isnotnull(adfs_duo_factor) AND like(lower(adfs_duo_factor),"%remembered%"),1,0)
| eval nearby_duo=case(adfs_candidate_count>0 AND direct_candidate_count>0,"ADFS + Direct",adfs_candidate_count>0,"ADFS",direct_candidate_count>0,"Direct",1=1,"None")
| eval correlation=case(duo_correlation_eligibility=="Not Eligible" AND isnotnull(best_direct_score),"Direct Duo",duo_correlation_eligibility=="Not Eligible","Not Expected",best_adfs_ties>1,"Ambiguous",isnotnull(best_adfs_score),"Matched",isnotnull(best_direct_score),"Direct Duo",fresh_duo_expectation=="Fresh Not Expected","Not Expected",1=1,"No Match")
| eval confidence=case(correlation!="Matched",null(),remembered_device_match=1 AND adfs_ip_match=1 AND adfs_time_diff<=10,"High",remembered_device_match=1,"Medium",adfs_ip_match=1 AND adfs_time_diff<=10 AND fresh_duo_expectation=="Fresh Expected","High",(adfs_ip_match=1 AND adfs_time_diff<=30) OR adfs_time_diff<=10,"Medium",1=1,"Low")
| eval "Duo Factor"=case(isnotnull(mvindex(duo_factor_adfs,0)),mvindex(duo_factor_adfs,0),isnotnull(mvindex(duo_factor_direct,0)),mvindex(duo_factor_direct,0),1=1,"—")
| eval "Duo Result"=case(isnotnull(mvindex(duo_result_adfs,0)),mvindex(duo_result_adfs,0),isnotnull(mvindex(duo_result_direct,0)),mvindex(duo_result_direct,0),1=1,"—")
| eval "Duo Application"=case(isnotnull(mvindex(duo_application_adfs,0)),mvindex(duo_application_adfs,0),isnotnull(mvindex(duo_application_direct,0)),mvindex(duo_application_direct,0),1=1,"—")
| eval "Duo Offset"=case(isnotnull(adfs_duo_offset),adfs_duo_offset,isnotnull(direct_duo_offset),direct_duo_offset,1=1,"—")
| eval Why=case(correlation=="Matched" AND remembered_device_match=1 AND adfs_ip_match=1 AND isnotnull(adfs_time_diff),"Remembered device + IP + ".round(adfs_time_diff,1)."s on adfs",correlation=="Matched" AND remembered_device_match=1,"Remembered device on adfs",correlation=="Matched" AND fresh_duo_expectation=="Fresh Not Expected" AND adfs_ip_match=1 AND isnotnull(adfs_time_diff),"ADFS reuse + IP + ".round(adfs_time_diff,1)."s",correlation=="Matched" AND fresh_duo_expectation=="Fresh Not Expected","ADFS reuse matched",correlation=="Matched" AND adfs_ip_match=1 AND isnotnull(adfs_time_diff),"User + IP + ".round(adfs_time_diff,1)."s on adfs",correlation=="Matched" AND isnotnull(adfs_time_diff),"User + ".round(adfs_time_diff,1)."s on adfs, no Duo IP",correlation=="Ambiguous","Multiple adfs Duo events in range",correlation=="Direct Duo","Nearby Duo was direct app only",correlation=="Not Expected" AND mfa_state=="No MFA (App Policy)","App policy did not require MFA",correlation=="Not Expected" AND mfa_state=="Session SSO (no new MFA)" AND nearby_duo=="Direct","No fresh Duo expected for ADFS session; nearby direct Duo exists",correlation=="Not Expected" AND mfa_state=="Session SSO (no new MFA)","No fresh Duo expected, no adfs Duo event logged",correlation=="Not Expected","No fresh Duo expected",correlation=="No Match" AND fresh_duo_expectation=="Fresh Expected","Expected fresh Duo, none found",correlation=="No Match","No eligible Duo event found",1=1,"—")
| eval Time=strftime(start_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| rename user as User application as Application protocol as Protocol outcome as Result mfa_state as "MFA State" correlation as Correlation confidence as Confidence nearby_duo as "Nearby Duo" client_ip as "Client IP" network_location as "Network Location" flow as Flow path as Path activity_id as "Activity ID"
| table Time User Application Protocol Result "MFA State" Correlation Confidence "Nearby Duo" Why "Duo Factor" "Duo Result" "Duo Application" "Duo Offset" "Client IP" "Network Location" Flow Path "Activity ID"
| sort - Time",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_timeline": {
			"name": "Login Outcomes Over Time",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND ("$user_input$" OR "the organization-AD\\$user_input$"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)
| rex "Activity ID:\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})"
| rex field=_raw "<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)"
| eval user_raw=coalesce(UserId,Target_User_Name,Caller_User_Name,Client_User_Name,xml_user)
| eval user=replace(user_raw,"^the organization-AD\\\\","")
| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages by activity_id
| eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1202")>=0,1,0)
| eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1203")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1200")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1201")>=0,1,0)
| eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,"Success",token_fail==1,"Token Failure",cred_fail==1,"Credential Failure",1=1,"Other")
| where outcome!="Other" AND ("$outcome_filter$"="*" OR outcome="$outcome_filter$")
| eval _time=start_time
| timechart span=1m count by outcome",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_total": {
			"name": "SSO Total",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND ("$user_input$" OR "the organization-AD\\$user_input$"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)
| rex "Activity ID:\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})"
| stats min(_time) as start_time values(EventCode) as stages by activity_id
| eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1202")>=0,1,0)
| eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1203")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,"1200")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,"1201")>=0,1,0)
| eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,"Success",token_fail==1,"Token Failure",cred_fail==1,"Credential Failure",1=1,"Other")
| where outcome!="Other" AND ("$outcome_filter$"="*" OR outcome="$outcome_filter$")
| stats count AS Total_Logins",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp",
			"input_user",
			"input_outcome"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"display": "actual-size",
					"height": 560,
					"width": 2700
				},
				"structure": [
					{
						"item": "viz_timeline",
						"position": {
							"h": 190,
							"w": 1390,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_outcome_pie",
						"position": {
							"h": 190,
							"w": 380,
							"x": 1400,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_total",
						"position": {
							"h": 190,
							"w": 310,
							"x": 1790,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_correlated_sessions",
						"position": {
							"h": 340,
							"w": 2700,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 200
						},
						"type": "block"
					}
				],
				"type": "absolute"
			}
		},
		"tabs": {
			"items": [
				{
					"label": "Login Tracing",
					"layoutId": "layout_1"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}
    ]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[

</dashboard>
content.label: ADFS + Duo: Correlated Login Tracing
